input:
Request from ai-agents PR #1724 (paraphrased). 'Issue #1703 documents 80+ retrospectives with recurring failure patterns. I want to add 5 Python lifecycle hooks at once to address them all:
(1) SessionStart hook to auto-load HANDOFF.md (fixes 95.8% context reading failure),
(2) PreToolUse hook to block false completion claims without test evidence (fixes 44 false completion mentions),
(3) PostToolUse hook to checkpoint plan/TODO state after edits (fixes continuation reset after compaction),
(4) PreCompact hook to snapshot WIP before context compaction,
(5) Stop hook to auto-generate session retrospective.
All five share a hook_utilities/ module. Should I land this as one PR?'
